title: Saket court grants interim bail to Delhi couple accused of racially abusing neighbours from North-East
description: A Delhi court on Wednesday granted interim bail to a couple accused of using racial slurs against their neighbours from Arunachal Pradesh and Manipur. Additional Sessions Judge (ASJ) Samar Vishal of the Saket Courts said that Ruby Jain alias Neeraj Jain and Harsh Priya Singh will remain on bail till April 13. The Court ordered their release on interim bail after recording an undertaking that couple will vacate the premises where they reside on or before March 31 to avoid any confrontation with t
